subtitles.threat.zatoplenie: The bunker is flooding and needs urgent pumping.
subtitles.threat.zemletryasenie: The structure is cracking and needs reinforcement.
subtitles.threat.kapcha: The control system is glitching and needs a reboot.
subtitles.threat.kuhonnyy-vzryv: The kitchen blast leaves dangerous aftermath.
subtitles.threat.napadenie-izvne: People are forcing their way in from outside.
subtitles.threat.nashestvie-krys: Rats threaten food supplies and sanitation.
subtitles.threat.otravlenie-vody: The water is contaminated and must be purified.
subtitles.threat.prizraki: Paranormal activity can push everyone into panic.
subtitles.threat.psi-ataka: A psychic strike amplifies stress and pressure.
subtitles.threat.stress-virus: A deadly virus outbreak demands quarantine.
subtitles.threat.sryv-ventilyatsii: Ventilation is failing and the air turns heavy.
subtitles.threat.sboy-elektroseti: The power grid flickers and behaves unpredictably.
subtitles.threat.pozhar-v-otseke: A fire breaks out in one of the compartments.
subtitles.threat.gribok-i-plesen: Mold and fungus spoil the air and filters.
subtitles.threat.parazity-v-zapasah: Parasites ruin food and consume the stores.
subtitles.threat.obrushenie-tonnelya: A tunnel collapse cuts off part of the bunker.
subtitles.threat.razgermetizatsiya: Decompression drops pressure and jams doors.
subtitles.threat.treschiny-v-stenah: Cracks spread through the walls and concrete.
subtitles.threat.bunt-i-raskol: A quarrel grows into open division and conflict.
subtitles.threat.shum-v-trubah: Knocks and vibrations travel through the pipes.
subtitles.threat.vnutrenniy-sabotazh: Someone inside is sabotaging the bunker.
subtitles.threat.sboy-dostupa: Locks and doors respond with dangerous delays.
subtitles.threat.toksichnyy-tuman: A toxic haze hangs outside the bunker.
subtitles.threat.holodnyy-front: A cold front sharply drops the temperature.
subtitles.threat.zagadochnyy-signal: A strange signal arrives: warning or bait.
subtitles.threat.pylnaya-burya: A dust storm clogs cracks and filters.
subtitles.threat.korroziya-i-syrost: Humidity and corrosion quickly eat through metal.
subtitles.threat.kondensat-v-otsekah: Condensation makes compartments damp and slick.
